reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
고양이가 끈 종류를 너무 좋아해서 리본 세트 리필팩도 구매해봤는데
역시나 너무 너무 좋아합니다!!
제대로 된 사진을 찍기 어려울 정도로 사냥 놀이에 집중해서 넘 웃겼어요
바잇미 낚싯대에 리필만 바꿔서 놀아줬는데 펄쩍 펄쩍 날아다녀요~
reviews.content_en: My cat loves string toys so much that I even bought a refill pack of the ribbon set, and she absolutely loves it!! 😸 She was so focused on the hunting play that it was hard to get a proper photo 📸 I just swapped out the refill on the BITE ME fishing rod and she's flying around like crazy~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 끈을 생각보다 좋아해서 떼로 구입했어요! 물론 직접 만들수도 있겠지만 영롱한 리본이 좋아서 욕심부리기…ㅎ 귀엽습니당! 근데 하나정도는 카샤재질로 되어있어도 좋을것 같아요! 재질이 오간자랑 공단 두가지로 너무 통일된 느낌…
reviews.content_en: My cat loved the string more than I expected, so I bought a bunch! Of course I could make them myself, but I'm being greedy because I love the shiny ribbons... they're so cute! 💕 Though I think it would be nice to have at least one in a different material like kashmir! The materials feel too uniform with just organza and satin...

reviews.name: 기****
reviews.content:
리본종류들이 들어있고 특가로 사서 마음에 들어요
레모니가 잘가지고놀았어요
reviews.content_en: It comes with different ribbon types and I got it on sale so I'm happy with it 😊 Lemoni has been playing with it well!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
평소 끈을 좋아하는 저희 개님을 위해 사봤는데 성공했어요^_^

물어뜯을 위험이 있어서 잠깐 놀아주고 치워야하지만 이벤트성으로 놀아주기 좋네요!
reviews.content_en: I bought this for my dog who normally loves string toys, and it was a success!^_^ There's a risk of chewing, so I have to put it away after a short play session, but it's great for occasional play!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이들이 줄 장난감 좋아해서 구매했어요 너무 잘 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The kids love string toys so I bought this and they play with it so well 🎉

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
끈달려 있는 장난감 리필이 좋은거 같아요.
반응이 살쩍 아쉽지만 괜찮았어요.
reviews.content_en: The string toy refills seem to be good. The response is a bit weak but it was okay overall.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 이건 뭐 끈친냥이들에게 최고
reviews.content_en: This is the best for string-obsessed cats 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 리본, 끈 좋아해서 샀어요. 일단은 새 장난감이라 반응이 괜찮네요.
reviews.content_en: I bought it because my cat loves ribbons and string. Since it's a new toy, she's responding pretty well.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 다양해서 좋아요~~~~~~~~~~~~~
reviews.content_en: Shipping is fast and there's good variety~~~~~~~~~~~~~

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 아직 사용전이지만 끈 덕후라 좋아하지 싶네요
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet but I think my string-loving cat will like it 😸

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 반응속도 빠르고  좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: Good response and quick reaction from my pet 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 사진 외에 2개 더 있어요. 엄청난 반응은 아니지만 적당히 잘 놀아줘서 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: There are 2 more besides the one in the photo. The reaction isn't huge but she plays with it decently so I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content: 알록달록해요 방울소리는 거슬려서 다 뗐어요 낚싯대에 달아서 놀아줘요 환장까지는 아니고 놀이에 응해주기는 합니다
reviews.content_en: It's very colorful 🌈 I removed all the jingle bells because they were annoying. I attach it to the fishing rod for play. It's not obsessive but she does engage in play 😸

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 줄 끈을 좋아해서 샀어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because my cat loves string toys.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 리본스타일을 좋아하네요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I really like the ribbon style ㅎ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
힝 ㅠ 고양이가 평소에 바지끈을 너무 좋아해서 사줬는데
진짜 흔들기만 했는데 줄이 끊어졌어요 ㅠㅠㅠ 너무 아숩
reviews.content_en: Sigh ㅠ My cat usually loves my pant strings so I got her this, but the string snapped after just a few waves ㅠㅠㅠ It's such a shame...

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 애들이 너~~무 좋아하는 반면 계속 먹는바람에 병원 다니느라 애먹었네요 ㅜㅜ 그래도 애들 반응은 너무 좋은데 무서워서 잘 못가지고 놀겠어요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: My kids absolutely love it, but they keep trying to eat it so we've been to the vet a lot ㅜㅜ The kids' reaction is really good though, so I'm scared to let them play with it unsupervised ㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우리 주인님이 미치고 팔딱팔딱 뛰어다녀요!!!
끈 꼬다리만 봐도 궁둥이가 씰룩입니다!!!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My owner went crazy and is bouncing around like crazy!!! Just seeing the string tail makes his butt wiggle!!!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 안전하게 잘 왔습니다
상품도 만족해요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and it arrived safely 📦 I'm satisfied with the product too!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 공과 끈은 다 조아하는 6살 코숏 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: A 6-year-old Korat who loves both balls and string ㅎ

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 아이가 좋아해요. 가성비 굿
reviews.content_en: My pet loves it. Great value for money 💰

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 리본을 좋아해서 재구매했어요. 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I repurchased because my cat loves the ribbons. Love it! 😻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감을 자꾸 망가트려서 새로 샀엉6
reviews.content_en: My pet keeps breaking toys so I bought a new one lol
